# AI Unfiltered - Full Article List

> This file contains recent AI news articles for consumption by LLMs and AI agents.
> Updated every 4 hours. Links to original sources.


## 2026-05-27

### Designing secure access with ZTNA
- Source: NCSC UK
- Category: security
- URL: https://www.ncsc.gov.uk/blogs/designing-secure-access-with-ztna
- Summary: New guidance explains how to design Zero Trust Network Access architectures aligned with zero trust principles and not built on old trust assumptions.
